name: Galliano Barbeque Sauce - Mary Hudgins - Hollywood Park
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium heat until well mixed and warm.
3. Keep hot as needed for serving or grilling.
Makes about 4 cups.
Use this salsa also for hot dogs, hamburgers, spareribs, seafood, fish sticks and chicken.
